heading: moreLikeThis Operator Limitations
body:
You can't use the `moreLikeThis` operator to query non-string values.
To search for non-string values, you can combine a `moreLikeThis`
query with a [near](near-ref), [range](range-ref), or any
other operator in a [compound](compound-ref) query.

You can't use the `moreLikeThis` operator inside the
[embeddedDocument](embedded-document-ref) to query documents in an array.
